def positive_loop_interleaves_core_work_logging_and_recovery_logic():
    rule_id = "loop_interleaves_core_work_logging_and_recovery_logic"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag loops that mix primary business logic, logging, and error recovery in one dense block."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
